meaning: adj.浪费的,消耗的n.浪费,损耗,消瘦
examples: We're wasting valuable time, time we can ill afford.
Why was he wasting her time with these irrelevancies?
"Unless these small hydro projects are done, we are wasting an existing resource, " says Babar.
But Nickell disagrees, saying that dead-end tips do more harm than good by wasting police resources.
